title: Dry Bulk Shipping - July 7, 2026
summary: The dry bulk shipping sector experienced a strong first half of 2026, driven by tight vessel supply and healthy iron ore demand, resulting in highly profitable Capesize earnings. Despite projections of heightened volatility in the second half due to slowing demand and fleet deliveries, positive market sentiment is expected to provide temporary mitigation. Simultaneously, China's oil imports have drastically declined due to geopolitical disruptions and a shifting economic landscape, adding to overall market uncertainty.
